auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: Meta access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Generate a permanent token from the official WhatsApp Cloud API getting started guide and Meta Business Settings: https://developers.facebook.com/docs/whatsapp/cloud-api/get-started and https://business.facebook.com/latest/settings . The token should include WhatsApp Business messaging and management permissions.

extraFields.label: Default WABA ID
extraFields.description: Optional default WhatsApp Business Account ID reused by phone-number and template actions.

actions.name: create_message_template
actions.description: Create a new WhatsApp message template for a WABA.

waba_id.description: WhatsApp Business Account ID. Omit to use the default credential WABA ID.

language.description: Template language code such as en_US.

items.description: A component submitted when creating the template.

components.description: Components submitted when creating the template.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a WhatsApp message template.

status.description: Initial template status returned by Meta.

actions.name: delete_message_template
actions.description: Delete all message template variants that share the same name.

waba_id.description: WhatsApp Business Account ID. Omit to use the default credential WABA ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a WhatsApp message template.

actions.name: get_business_profile
actions.description: Get the business profile configured for a WhatsApp Business phone number.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input for reading a WhatsApp business profile.

actions.name: get_media_info
actions.description: Get metadata and a short-lived download URL for uploaded media.

url.description: Short-lived download URL for the media file.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the uploaded media.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the media file.

file_size.description: Size of the media file in bytes.

actions.name: get_message_templates
actions.description: List message templates for a WhatsApp Business Account.

waba_id.description: WhatsApp Business Account ID. Omit to use the default credential WABA ID.

after.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

limit.description: Maximum number of templates to return.

name_or_content.description: Optional filter that matches template name or content.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing WhatsApp message templates.

items.description: A template component returned by Meta.

previous.description: URL for the previous page, when provided.

next.description: URL for the next page, when provided.

actions.name: get_phone_number
actions.description: Get metadata for a specific WhatsApp Business phone number.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve.

display_phone_number.description: Phone number in display format, including country code.

verified_name.description: Verified business name shown to WhatsApp users.

quality_rating.description: Meta quality rating for this phone number.

code_verification_status.description: Verification status of the phone number.

platform_type.description: Hosting platform type, such as CLOUD_API.

last_onboarded_time.description: Timestamp for the latest phone number onboarding event.

level.description: Messaging throughput tier for the phone number.

throughput.description: Messaging throughput information returned by Meta.

application.description: Webhook endpoint configured for the phone number, when Meta returns one.

actions.name: get_phone_numbers
actions.description: List phone numbers for a WhatsApp Business Account.

waba_id.description: WhatsApp Business Account ID. Omit to use the default credential WABA ID.

limit.description: Maximum number of phone numbers to return.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing WhatsApp phone numbers.

display_phone_number.description: Phone number in display format, including country code.

verified_name.description: Verified business name shown to WhatsApp users.

quality_rating.description: Meta quality rating for this phone number.

code_verification_status.description: Verification status of the phone number.

platform_type.description: Hosting platform type, such as CLOUD_API.

last_onboarded_time.description: Timestamp for the latest phone number onboarding event.

level.description: Messaging throughput tier for the phone number.

throughput.description: Messaging throughput information returned by Meta.

application.description: Webhook endpoint configured for the phone number, when Meta returns one.

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers returned for the WABA.

previous.description: URL for the previous page, when provided.

next.description: URL for the next page, when provided.

actions.name: get_template_status
actions.description: Get status details for a specific message template.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input for reading a WhatsApp template.

items.description: A template component returned by Meta.

actions.name: send_contacts
actions.description: Send one or more contacts to a WhatsApp user.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

contacts.description: Contacts to send in the message.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

body_text.description: Body text shown above the buttons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the reply button.

title.description: Button label shown to the user.

buttons.description: Reply buttons shown in the interactive message.

reply_to_message_id.description: WhatsApp message ID to reply to.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp interactive button message.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: send_interactive_list
actions.description: Send an interactive list message with sections and rows.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

body_text.description: Body text shown above the list button.

button_text.description: Label shown on the list button.

title.description: Row title shown to the user.

sections.description: Sections and rows shown inside the interactive list.

reply_to_message_id.description: WhatsApp message ID to reply to.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp interactive list message.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: send_location
actions.description: Send a location message to a WhatsApp user.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp location message.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: send_media
actions.description: Send a media message by public URL.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

link.description: Public HTTPS URL for the media file.

caption.description: Optional caption for image, video, or document messages.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

actions.name: send_media_by_id
actions.description: Send previously uploaded media by Meta media ID.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

caption.description: Optional caption for image, video, or document messages.

filename.description: Filename to attach when sending a document by media ID.

reply_to_message_id.description: WhatsApp message ID to reply to.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp media message by uploaded media ID.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a text message to a WhatsApp user.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

text.description: Text body of the message to send.

message_id.description: WhatsApp message ID. Omit to send a standalone message.

preview_url.description: Whether Meta should render a link preview for the first URL in the text.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: send_template_message
actions.description: Send an approved WhatsApp template message.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

to_number.description: Recipient phone number in international format without the plus sign.

language_code.description: Template language code used for delivery.

type.description: Template component type such as header, body, or button.

sub_type.description: Button subtype such as quick_reply or url.

parameters.description: Parameters used to fill template placeholders.

items.description: Template component parameters passed to Meta.

components.description: Template component parameters passed to Meta.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp template message.

input.description: Phone number submitted in the request.

wa_id.description: WhatsApp ID resolved by Meta for the contact.

contacts.description: Resolved contacts associated with the delivery request.

actions.name: upload_media
actions.description: Upload media to Meta and return the resulting media record.

phone_number_id.description: Meta phone number ID for the WhatsApp Business number used by this action.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

file.description: Source file to upload to Meta.

url.description: Short-lived download URL for the media file.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the uploaded media.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the media file.

file_size.description: Size of the media file in bytes.
